anti_patterns: Do not treat a historical report as fresher than current runtime status.
body:
# BTC 5m Multi-Strategy Shadow Scan

- Generated: `2026-03-12 08:14:35 UTC`
- Candidates scanned: `0`
- Resolved epochs available: `0`
- Date range: `unknown` -> `unknown`
- Simulation style: `1 share per chosen epoch, hold to resolution, gross PnL only`
- Note: `No fees, slippage, partial fills, or opposite-side price reconstruction included`

## Strategy Grid

| Strategy | Principle | Trades | Win Rate | Avg PnL | Total PnL | ROI on Cost | Max DD | Trades/Day | Median Price | Median Time Left | R8 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| baseline_binance_all | Raw trend-following baseline | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |
| current_guarded_shadow | Cost and timing discipline | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |
| early_quality_momentum | Trend strength plus early entry | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |
| microstructure_confirmed | Order-flow confirmation | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |
| trend_regime_only | Regime-aware trend trading | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |
| discount_window_delta | Late-entry value hunting | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |
| ensemble_ranked | Cross-source quality ranking | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |
| late_certainty_snipe | High-certainty late entry | 0 | 0.0% | $0.000 | $0.000 | 0.0% | $0.000 | 0.0 | 0.000 | 0s | ANECDOTAL n=0 |

## Best Candidates

### baseline_binance_all
- Principle: `Raw trend-following baseline`
- Description: All BTC 5m binance_momentum candidates, no cost or timing discipline.
- Result: `0` trades, `0.0%` WR, `$0.000` total gross PnL, `0.0%` ROI on deployed cost
- Trade mix: `none`
- Price buckets: `none`
- Original statuses: `none`

### current_guarded_shadow
- Principle: `Cost and timing discipline`
- Description: Binance momentum with price <= 0.80 and at least 210s remaining.
- Result: `0` trades, `0.0%` WR, `$0.000` total gross PnL, `0.0%` ROI on deployed cost
- Trade mix: `none`
- Price buckets: `none`
- Original statuses: `none`

### early_quality_momentum
- Principle: `Trend strength plus early entry`
- Description: Binance momentum with >=0.30% momentum, price <= 0.75, and at least 240s remaining.
- Result: `0` trades, `0.0%` WR, `$0.000` total gross PnL, `0.0%` ROI on deployed cost
- Trade mix: `none`
- Price buckets: `none`
- Original statuses: `none`

## Dataset Gaps

- `epoch_coverage` is absent in both live snapshots, so this scan cannot score truly missed BTC 5m epochs that produced no logged signal at all.
- Gross PnL only: shadow candidates do not include real fill quality, fees, cancellations, or slippage.
- Opposite-side prices are not stored per signal, so this scan cannot fairly simulate mean-reversion or side-flip strategies off the same order book.
- There is no single terminal decision state per candidate across the whole history, so strategy attribution still depends on `status` plus stage logs rather than one canonical decision enum.
- Config-era tagging is still incomplete, so this scan blends multiple live rule eras unless you filter by time range.

## Recommendation

Promote the top 1-2 strategies to a dedicated shadow comparison first. Do not treat the best gross backtest as production-ready until it survives fee-aware replay and current live shadow observation.
